playwrightWorkflow.summary: Targeted Playwright workflow executed against the real AnimeBounty-Info project after npm ci and npm run build. The user-library spec failed with a whole-test 60000ms timeout. Captured output did not include a locator/actionability stack, and no trace zip was found.

notes: Baseline suite and registry checks passed before edits.
Dry-run install is safe and repo-scoped.

Routing specificity was fixed and verified: Playwright failure intent routes to frontend.playwright-debug; backend-only intent returns no frontend recommendations; vague visual/design intent ranks design skills above frontend.playwright-debug.
A real Playwright workflow ran on AnimeBounty-Info and generated an HTML report artifact, supporting real-project-smoke but not curated by itself.
A separate targeted passing Playwright smoke confirmed trace.zip capture with explicit --trace=on and --output=test-results-artifacts.
frontend.playwright-debug trigger precision/recall now passes the suite thresholds, but this is still not a full task-eval/pairwise run.
blockers: No implemented runner exists in this repo for full task-eval execution, no-skill/old-skill deltas, pairwise comparison, or blind human/LLM preference judging across the 40 task seeds.
Curated promotion requires minimumBlindPreferenceShare and task delta evidence; those gates were not executed and must not be fabricated.
